---
title: "cstar.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/cstar.ts"
loc: 41
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.95
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 4.33
overall_score: 4.77
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 127 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Command](file://commander)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [runStartupCeremony](file://./src/node/ceremony.ts)
- [registerStartCommand](file://./src/node/core/commands/start.ts)
- [registerPythonSpokes](file://./src/node/core/commands/python.ts)
- [registerPennyOneCommand](file://./src/node/core/commands/pennyone.ts)
- [registerRavenCommand](file://./src/node/core/commands/ravens.ts)
- [registerDispatcher](file://./src/node/core/commands/dispatcher.ts)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `pkgPath`
- `pkg`
- `program`
- `isHelpOrVersion`
